category_sources: source_facts.description says ultra-high performance API Gateway built in Go; official KrakenD docs describe KrakenD as an extensible high-performance open-source API gateway.
display_name_sources: Official krakend.io site and docs use KrakenD; source_facts.name is krakend.
docs_sources: Dedicated official KrakenD documentation is hosted at krakend.io/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/krakend/krakend-ce; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official KrakenD documentation describe an API gateway for aggregating, transforming, filtering, and securing microservice endpoints.
